channel.title: Maine Attorney General Opinions
channel.description: AG opinions moved off maine.gov/ag (legacy URLs 404); now hosted by the Maine Law & Legislative Reference Library. Low publication frequency (a handful/year); monitored by full-page fingerprint.

item.title: Monitoring started: Maine Attorney General Opinions
item.description: This source is being monitored for changes. No update has been detected yet; a new item will appear here the next time the page changes. This placeholder confirms the feed is live.
